description: You are a quantitative analyst qualifying the SampleMACrossOver strategy for live deployment on SPY. In NinjaTrader 8, complete the following workflow: (1) Open the Strategy Analyzer and run a parameter optimization on SPY using Daily bars from January 1, 2023 to December 31, 2024. Optimize the Fast parameter from 5 to 25 (step 5) and the Slow parameter from 30 to 60 (step 10). (2) After the optimization completes, identify the parameter combination with the highest Net Profit. Record the optimal Fast value, Slow value, Net Profit, and Max Drawdown to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\qualification_report.txt in the format: Fast=X Slow=Y NetProfit=Z MaxDrawdown=W (3) Run a fresh backtest using those exact optimal parameters and export the execution list to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\qualified_trades.csv. (4) Open a new SPY Daily chart and apply two SMA indicators with the optimal Fast and Slow periods you identified. Save the workspace as 'StrategyQualification'. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
